scripts.lint: git log --pretty=format:'%s' | grep -vE '^(feat|fix|docs|chore|build|ci|refactor|test|polish)(\(.+\))?: .+' && exit 1 || echo 'commits OK'
scripts.test: python3 -m json.tool specs/vessel-format/manifest.schema.json >/dev/null && echo 'schema json OK'
scripts.validate:manifests: python3 -m json.tool specs/vessel-format/manifest.schema.json >/dev/null && echo 'manifest schema JSON OK'
